description: Composition Grey polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with blue tipping, short sleeves, adidas patented stripes in contrast colour across the shoulders extending to the sleeves, buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This T-shirt wins in any season with its individualistic look. Wear this to any off-duty event to look your best - pair it with dark denims and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
